hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu in Nagamadu offers a sun terrace, lush garden, and a family-friendly restaurant. Guests enjoy free WiFi, private check-in and check-out, and a 24-hour front desk.
Comfortable Amenities: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, balconies with lake or garden views, and modern amenities such as tea and coffee makers and free toiletries. Additional facilities include an outdoor play area, picnic spots, and free on-site parking.
Dining Experience: The restaurant serves a variety of cuisines including Chinese, Italian, seafood, local, and international. Breakfast options include continental, full English/Irish, vegetarian, and Asian. Dining ambience ranges from traditional to modern and romantic.

hotels.name: Bar Reef Resort
hotels.description_fr:
We are thrilled to announce that Bar Reef Resort will officially reopen its doors on 01st December 2025!
After a period of rest and rejuvenation, we are ready to welcome you back to the natural beauty, tranquility, and unmatched hospitality that you know and love. Whether you're returning for the serenity of our beachfront villas or discovering us for the first time, we can't wait to share the magic of Bar Reef with you once again.
ðŸ“… Bookings open soon â€“ stay tuned for special reopening offers and updates!
Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to seeing you in paradise.
Stretched over 2 km of private sandy beach, Bar Reef Resort in Kalpitiya offers rustic yet charming accommodation surrounded by landscaped gardens.
